title: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption
description: The system's architecture and components lack details, potentially leading to uncontrolled resource consumption by malicious actors. This could result in denial-of-service attacks, overwhelming system resources and making the application unavailable to legitimate users.
attack_vector: Resource exhaustion attacks (e.g., HTTP floods, slowloris), denial-of-service attacks targeting specific services.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting and traffic shaping.
Utilize a Content Delivery Network (CDN) to distribute traffic.
Employ intrusion detection and prevention systems (IDS/IPS).
